page: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the EADSv5 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor. It features 64 vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The server is equipped with 512 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. Additionally, it includes 2458 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage capabilities.

Benchmark evaluations indicate strong multi-core and memory subsystem capabilities. The server achieved a top-tier rating in PassMark memory tests and strong performance in cached read-only memory bandwidth. Multi-core execution is highly efficient, as demonstrated by strong results in stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Database and in-memory operations are also highly performant, with strong scores in PassMark database operations and Redis SET operations.

While multi-threaded and memory-bound tasks perform exceptionally well, single-core performance and uncached large-block memory bandwidth fall into the average tier. Large-scale LLM text generation represents a bottleneck, scoring in the lower percentile. Given its high memory density and local storage capacity, this server is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, relational databases, in-memory caching systems, and data analytics pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 64 vCPUs and 32 physical cores running at 3.525 GHz. It features 512 GB of RAM, offering a generous 8 GB per core ratio, alongside 2458 GB of local storage. Built on Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance delivers top-tier memory performance and strong multi-core capabilities, as evidenced by high PassMark memory and database scores. While single-core performance and uncached memory bandwidth are average, its high memory density and local storage make it highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads. It is best suited for large databases, in-memory caching, and data processing applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v5 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and 2458 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier memory performance for database and caching workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and 2458 GB of local storage for demanding database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high-density RAM and local storage for demanding database and data processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 vCPUs and 512 GB of RAM powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor
2458 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier memory performance and strong multi-core benchmark results
Strong database and Redis SET operations throughput
Ideal for memory-intensive databases, caching, and data analytics
